name: Antibot-Detector
description: Real-time detection of anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs & fingerprinting techniques. Identifies Cloudflare, Akamai, DataDome, reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, Shape Security & more with confidence scoring and advanced capture tools.
readme_summary: This Chrome extension detects and analyzes various anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and browser fingerprinting techniques in real-time. It provides users with confidence scores, detection history, and advanced tools to understand how websites protect themselves from automated access.
key_features: Real-time detection of anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and fingerprinting
Multi-layer detection system (DOM, Network, Payload, JS Hooks, Window Properties)
Support for major anti-bot systems (Cloudflare, Akamai, DataDome, etc.)
Support for various CAPTCHAs (reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, FunCaptcha, etc.)
Detection of common browser fingerprinting methods
Advanced capture tools and intermediate page handling
Customizable rules editor and settings panel
Performance optimizations (caching, early exit, lazy evaluation)
Privacy-focused with local detection and CSP compliance
primary_use_case: To provide users with real-time insights into the bot detection and anti-scraping mechanisms employed by websites, aiding security researchers and web developers.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital detective, wearing a magnifying glass monocle and a trench coat made of code, stands before a complex, glowing digital gate representing a website. The detective is actively scanning incoming data packets, which are depicted as small, shadowy figures. Some figures are being flagged with bright red 'X' marks (representing detected bots/CAPTCHAs), while others pass through with a green checkmark. Subtle UI elements showing confidence scores and detector types float around the detective. The background is a dark, abstract network grid. The overall mood is one of active investigation and security. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a cyberpunk aesthetic, emphasizing clarity and the detection process.

name: colota
readme_summary: Colota is a self-hosted GPS location tracking application for Android devices. It allows users to send their location data to a private server, offering features like offline functionality, geofencing, and encrypted backups, all while prioritizing user privacy with no analytics or telemetry.
primary_use_case: Users who want to track their location privately and send it to their own server, rather than relying on third-party services.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, vintage compass with a glowing digital needle pointing towards a small, personalized server icon in the distance. The compass is placed on a map that subtly displays digital data streams flowing from the compass towards the server. Around the compass, small, abstract icons represent privacy (a shield), offline capability (a cloud with a download arrow), and user control (a gear icon). The background is a soft, gradient of blues and greens, suggesting a clear sky and open road. The overall mood is one of secure, independent tracking. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with clean lines and a focus on the central metaphor.

name: cursify
description: Cursor Animation Library for React & Next.js
readme_summary: This repository provides a collection of reusable UI components and animations for React and Next.js applications, focusing on enhancing user experience with dynamic visual effects. It includes components for animations, interactive elements, and layout utilities, designed to be easily integrated into modern web development projects.
primary_use_case: Enhancing the visual appeal and interactivity of React and Next.js web applications through custom cursor animations and dynamic UI components.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, stylized cursor, depicted as a glowing, ethereal entity, playfully interacting with a digital landscape representing a React application. The cursor leaves trails of shimmering particles and morphs into different shapes (like a magnifying glass or a pointer) as it hovers over interactive elements such as buttons and cards. Subtle code snippets and UI icons float in the background, hinting at the underlying technology. The overall scene is vibrant and dynamic, set against a clean, modern backdrop, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with soft, glowing lighting to emphasize the magical and engaging nature of the cursor animations.
